input: How do I reset my password?
expected_output: Use the account portal reset link.
context: Account access policy: users reset passwords with the reset link in the account portal.

expected_output: Support is available from 6 a.m. to 6 p.m. Pacific, Monday through Friday.
context: Support coverage: agents are available from 6 a.m. to 6 p.m. Pacific, Monday through Friday.

expected_output: Refunds are processed within five business days after approval.
context: Billing policy: approved refunds are processed within five business days after approval.

input: Where can customers delete their account?
expected_output: Customers can request account deletion from the privacy dashboard.
context: Privacy policy: customers can request account deletion from the privacy dashboard.
